chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ إِلَى صَاحِبِ الدَّارِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – The Indication and the wordings upon the Master<sup>asws</sup> of the world (12<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/ 4)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) جَلَالَتُكَ تَمْنَعُنِي مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِكَ فَتَأْذَنُ لِي أَنْ أَسْأَلَكَ فَقَالَ سَلْ قُلْتُ يَا سَيِّدِي هَلْ لَكَ وَلَدٌ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ فَقُلْتُ فَإِنْ حَدَثَ بِكَ حَدَثٌ فَأَيْنَ أَسْأَلُ عَنْهُ قَالَ بِالْمَدِينَةِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Is’haq, from Abu Hashim Al Ja’fary who said,

‘I said to Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup> (11<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) ‘Your<sup>asws</sup> majesty prevents me from asking you<sup>asws</sup>, so if you<sup>asws</sup> were to permit me, I shall ask you<sup>asws</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ask’. I said, ‘O my Chief! Is there a son<sup>asws</sup> for you<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’. So I said, ‘So if there occurs with you an occurrence (of death), so where shall I ask about him<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘At Al-Medina’’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Ishaq from abu Hashim al-Ja‘fari who has said the following. “I said to abu Muhammad (a.s.), ‘Your grace causes shyness to me to ask you questions. May I ask you a question?” He said, “Yes, you may ask.” I said, “My master, do you have a son?” He said, “Yes, I do have a son.” I then said, “If anything will happen to you, where would I ask him (about my religion)?” He replied, “Ask him in Madina.”
